SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR FURTHER DETAILS OF JUDGMENT

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-23-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Gilberg Jay, Clerks C. Amador/K. Shaw, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Marvin A. Remmich is not present.
Attorney, Saul Martin Ferster, appearing on behalf of the plaintif.

Defendants Jason Miller and Carolyn Hamilton are present.
Andrew Catterall representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did not settle, the trial date of August 27, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. remains as set.
